targets.rawSql: SELECT sc.name AS "Característica", ROUND(AVG(cc.value)::numeric,4) AS "Valor" FROM characteristics_calculatedcharacteristic cc JOIN characteristics_supportedcharacteristic sc ON sc.id = cc.characteristic_id WHERE cc.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY sc.name ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT ss.name AS "Subcaracterística", ROUND(AVG(cs.value)::numeric,4) AS "Valor" FROM subcharacteristics_calculatedsubcharacteristic cs JOIN subcharacteristics_supportedsubcharacteristic ss ON ss.id = cs.subcharacteristic_id WHERE cs.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY ss.name ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT sm.name AS "Medida", ROUND(AVG(cm.value)::numeric,4) AS "Valor" FROM measures_calculatedmeasure cm JOIN measures_supportedmeasure sm ON sm.id = cm.measure_id WHERE cm.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY sm.name ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT r.name AS "Repositório", MAX(CASE WHEN sc.key='reliability' THEN ROUND(cc.value::numeric,3) END) AS "Reliability", MAX(CASE WHEN sc.key='maintainability' THEN ROUND(cc.value::numeric,3) END) AS "Maintainability", MAX(CASE WHEN sc.key='functional_suitability' THEN ROUND(cc.value::numeric,3) END) AS "Func. Suitability" FROM characteristics_calculatedcharacteristic cc JOIN characteristics_supportedcharacteristic sc ON sc.id = cc.characteristic_id JOIN organizations_repository r ON r.id = cc.repository_id WHERE cc.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (repository_id, characteristic_id) id FROM characteristics_calculatedcharacteristic ORDER BY repository_id, characteristic_id, created_at DESC) GROUP BY r.name ORDER BY r.name

WITH first_val AS (SELECT repository_id, value FROM tsqmi_tsqmi WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (repository_id) id FROM tsqmi_tsqmi ORDER BY repository_id, created_at ASC)), last_val AS (SELECT repository_id, value FROM tsqmi_tsqmi WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (repository_id) id FROM tsqmi_tsqmi ORDER BY repository_id, created_at DESC)) SELECT r.name AS "Repositório", ROUND(f.value::numeric,4) AS "TSQMI Inicial", ROUND(l.value::numeric,4) AS "TSQMI Final", ROUND((l.value - f.value)::numeric,4) AS "Delta" FROM first_val f JOIN last_val l ON l.repository_id = f.repository_id JOIN organizations_repository r ON r.id = f.repository_id ORDER BY 4 DESC

panels.title: Delta de Qualidade — Início vs Fim do Período (TSQMI)
